description: Capability for the main window. Explicit allowlist: deep-link (OAuth callback), updater, and opener (scoped to the backend login URL only) — plus the core defaults needed for a plain webview window (window/webview/event/etc). No filesystem, shell, or process permissions are granted; see docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-02-tauri-desktop-client-design.md#native-permission-scope.
